History of the wars resulting from the French revolution: With a relation of the circumstances which led to that important event. Containing every material occurrance, from the assembling of the notables in 1787, to the present period; including the life of Napoleon Bonaparte, from the commencement of his military career, to his final departure for St. Helena. Also authentic biographical sketches of the most eminent public character of Europe--
by
Edward Seymour
First published in 1815
